zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Croftes於1543年出生在英國素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福時，她的父親Edmund Croftes24歲，母親Eleanor Burgh27歲。她於大約1565年與John Southwell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1617年9月在英國素福爾可巴哈姆享年74歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可巴哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Croftes于1543年出生在英国素福爾可韋斯特 斯托福时，她的父亲Edmund Croftes24岁，母亲Eleanor Burgh27岁。她于大约1565年与John Southwell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1617年9月在英国素福爾可巴哈姆享年74岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可巴哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Croftes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Croftes was born in 1543, in West Stow, Suffolk, England, her father, Edmund Croftes, was 24 and her mother, Eleanor Burgh, was 27. She married John Southwell about 1565. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in September 1617, in Barham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Barham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Croftes est née en 1543, à West Stow, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Croftes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Burgh, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Southwell environ 1565. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1617, à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Croftes 1543 in West Stow, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Croftes 24 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Burgh 27. Sie hat um 1565 John Southwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1617 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Barham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Barham, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato John Southwell circa 1565. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Croftesが1543年にイギリススフォルクウエスト ストウで生まれた時，父Edmund Croftesは24歳，母Eleanor Burghは27歳であった。約1565年にJohn Southwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1617年9月にイギリススフォルクバーハムで74歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Croftes(이)가 1543년 영국 수폴크 웨스트 스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Croftes(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Burgh(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 John Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1617년 9월 영국 수폴크 바람에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 바람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Croftes nasceu em 1543, em West Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Croftes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Burgh, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Southwell aproximadamente 1565. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1617, em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Croftes родилась в 1543 г. в местности вест стоу, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Croftes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Burgh, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Southwell около 1565 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла сентябрь 1617 г. в местности барам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности барам, суффолк, Англия.
